payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial view of a dark-stained wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular central panel and simple raised molding; vertical orientation with a satin-to-slightly-gloss finish, left edge partially obscured by a bright object and the crop cuts the cabinet edges, no visible hardware; occupies most of the crop and appears fairly close to the camera (approximately 1.0 m).
